Table	Create Table
state_building_codes	CREATE TABLE `state_building_codes` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `state` enum('nsw','vic','qld','sa','wa','tas','nt','act') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `code_type` enum('building_code','plumbing_code','electrical_code','fire_safety','energy_efficiency','accessibility','environmental') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `reference` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `summary` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `requirements` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `applicable_trades` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `effective_date` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `expiry_date` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `source_url` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `regulatory_body` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
